LanguageData.EM_CrimsonSpine_SanguineAscendancy.label: sanguine ascendancy
LanguageData.EM_CrimsonSpine_SanguineAscendancy.descr:
When blood resonance stays in the high band, the implanted dynasty spine pushes each movement and strike into a predatory peak cadence.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_CrimsonDynastySpine.label: crimson dynasty spine
LanguageData.EM_CrimsonDynastySpine.description:
This spine keeps predator grace and hemogenic vigor as a baseline, then grants blood resonance only when the host carries the Hemogenic gene, with resonance stage adjusting dynamically to current blood state. Linked effects split by state: bloodfrenzy below 45% health in combat, noble poise above 80% health out of combat, duelist ascendancy during melee engagements, and sanguine ascendancy while resonance remains in the high range.
-- easyrim
